name: codeweb-lens
description: Callers and blast radius above every mapped symbol, served from .codeweb/graph.json — the codeweb structure graph, in the editor.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Read-only: renders numbers from .codeweb/graph.json; never executes workspace code.

commands.title: codeweb: Open symbol in the interactive report
codeweb: Refresh CodeLens from the graph

codeweb.lens.enabled.description: Show codeweb CodeLens above mapped symbols: direct callers · blast radius (symbols affected if this changes).

codeweb.lens.minCallers.description: Hide lenses for symbols with fewer than this many direct callers.
